name: 42matters
description: 42matters — mobile app intelligence provider with Explorer research tool, APIs and data services delivering comprehensive insights across app stores and CTV channel stores.

seo.title: 42matters — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: 42matters: 42matters — mobile app intelligence provider with Explorer research tool, APIs and data services delivering comprehensive insights across app stores

when_to_use: Researching competitor SDK installs across App Store and Google Play
Tracking CTV channel store growth for streaming app strategy
Building app market intelligence dashboards via Explorer API
Estimating download volume for M&A or investment due diligence
Monitoring category ranking shifts across iOS and Android

pros: Deep app + CTV store data via Explorer and APIs
Enterprise-grade datasets used for market research
Flexible API access for custom integrations
cons: Enterprise pricing out of reach for indie devs
Steep learning curve for the Explorer UI
Less ASO workflow polish than AppTweak/Sensor Tower
Docs assume technical/data team on your side
review.verdict: Solid raw data provider for teams building their own ASO/market pipelines, not plug-and-play ASO software.
review.best_for: Data teams and analysts who need app + CTV store data piped into BI or custom tools
review.not_for: Indie developers wanting a guided ASO workflow on a small budget

lock_in.reason: Data accessible via API but market intelligence stays proprietary

developer_experience.reason: REST API documented, Explorer UI, limited SDKs
